---
title: "Resources"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-note title="Resources"}
-   [Create websites using Quarto](https://posit-conf-2024.github.io/quarto-websites/){target="_blank"}

-   [The GRAPH Courses](https://thegraphcourses.org/courses/websites-and-dashboards-with-r/topics/creating-a-personal-website-optional/){target="_blank"}

-   [Happy Git and GitHub for the useR](https://happygitwithr.com/){target="_blank"}

-   [From Notebooks to the Web: Quarto & GitHub Pages](https://musa-550-fall-2023.github.io/content/week-9/lecture-9A.html){target="_blank"}

-   [Abyoso Hapsoro Nurhadi](https://abyoso-hapsoro.github.io/){target="_blank"}

-   [Gerko Vink](https://www.gerkovink.com/){target="_blank"}

-   [Markup Languages and Reproducible Programming in Statistics](https://www.gerkovink.com/markup/){target="_blank"}

-   [Andrew Heis](https://www.andrewheiss.com/){target="_blank"}

-   [Marvin Schmitt](https://marvinschmitt.com/){target="_blank"}

-   [Matt Worthington](https://www.mrworthington.com/){target="_blank"}

-   [Silvia Canelon](https://silviacanelon.com/blog/2023-09-29-hello-quarto/#designing-the-site){target="_blank"}

-   [Jim Hester](https://www.jimhester.com/#){target="_blank"}

-   [Noel Mangai](https://github.com/NoelMga){target="_blank"}

### For Translating md files

-   [frank blog](https://edenian-prince.github.io/blog/posts/2024-08-21-translate-md-files/){target="_blank"}
:::
